title: HOMELESSNESS PREVENTION - 211info
text: SIUSLAW AREA RESOURCE CENTER HOMELESSNESS PREVENTION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers eviction prevention services, which may include help with current or past-due rent and utilities (like electric, water, gas, garbage, sewer, or heating fuel), landlord support, and case management. Services depend on available funding and are not guaranteed. 1536 W 12th Street Florence, OR 97439 Eligibility: Must be a current tenant who is unstably housed or at imminent risk of homelessness Hours: Monday-Thursday 10am-3:30pm, Friday 10am-4pm Email (541) 997-2816 , Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Person (541) 997-2816 Kevin Furber, Housing Manager Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Proof of income, photo ID, notices, letters, or other documentation that shows unpaid bills, late payments, or additional proof of risk of homelessness AREA SERVED: Zip codes 97412, 97430, 97439, 97453, 97490, 97493 SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm, closed major holidays Services: Eviction Prevention Assistance Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - LANE COUNTY COORDINATED ENTRY ACCESS POINTS HOUSING/SHELTER - RENT ASSISTANCE MATERIAL GOODS - COMMUNITY ASSISTANCE SERVICES MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - DOMESTIC VIOLENCE SUPPORT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. SIUSLAW AREA RESOURCE CENTER
